summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact reports all 16 refs as open pull requests, security_sensitive=false, and this shard explicitly has no shared canonical. Because merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal closeout are disabled for this job, each PR is classified conservatively as independent backlog work rather than a dedupe/closure candidate.
